case_title: CALAUNAN, ROSALIE P. et al VS DOLLESIN, EMIL QUITO et al

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY CALAUNAN, ROSALIE P. CALAUNAN, ARNULFO AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLESIN, EMIL QUITO DOLLESIN, MICHELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2007 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOLLESIN, EMIL QUITO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALAUNAN, ROSALIE P. CALAUNAN, ARNULFO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOLLESIN, EMIL QUITO DOLLESIN, MICHELLE DEFT MICHELLE DOLLESIN DISM WITH PREJUDICE. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLFT'S ARE ENTITLED TO RETURN OF THEIR $1000 SECURITY DEPOSIT + PENALTIES OF $1000 FOR DEFT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5. HOWEVER THE COURT ORDERS AN EQUITABLE SETOFF IN THE SUM OF $2000 FOR LAST MONTH'S RENT CAUSED BY PLFT'S BREACH OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
